input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.13.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.13.3
            TITLE: the vehicle receives points based on the laps and/or parts of endurance completed.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.13.3: The vehicle receives points based on the laps and/or parts of Endurance completed.
D.12.13.3 The vehicle receives points based on the laps and/or parts of Endurance completed.   
The Endurance Laps Score is worth up to 25 points

final_answer: rule D.12.13.3: The vehicle receives points based on the laps and/or parts of Endurance completed. D.12.13.3 The vehicle receives points based on the laps and/or parts of Endurance completed. The Endurance Laps Score is worth up to 25 points
